notes: Published to the HF dataset repo under the standard ST312 artifact layout with attribution to the canonical UCI Statlog (German Credit Data) archive and DOI 10.24432/C5NC77. The canonical preserved source surface is the original symbolic german.data file; german.data-numeric is auxiliary only. ST312 reuses the public TheFinAI/german-credit-benchmark split only after exact 1,000/1,000 row-level replication at 700 train / 100 valid / 200 test. The default evaluator is cost-sensitive because UCI explicitly specifies the asymmetric cost matrix [[0,1],[5,0]] over source labels 1 = Good and 2 = Bad. This historical credit-scoring benchmark contains sensitive demographic-style variables and should not be interpreted as a deployment recommendation.
